title: Delicious Crunchy Thai Chicken Curry
description: A rich and crunchy Thai dish featuring marjoram and a low-sodium friendly recipe, this meal is perfect for a weeknight dinner and can be prepared in a kazan cauldron.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a kazan cauldron over medium heat.
Add the chicken to the cauldron and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry powder, marjoram, and brown sugar to the cauldron and stir to combine.
Pour in the coconut milk and fish sauce, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the crunchy peanuts and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season the curry with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with additional marjoram if desired.
